summary: Plan-only live PR inventory classification. No shared canonical is selected because the job explicitly says this shard is not a dedupe cluster. All listed PRs remain open and are classified independently; no close, merge, fix, label, or comment mutation is planned.

actions.reason: Draft maintainer-owned feature work should stay open outside this cleanup shard; no canonical duplicate or safe close path is present.
Focused contributor fix remains independently trackable, but proof is not green and no closure/merge/fix mutation is allowed in this job.
Substantive contributor PR with failing checks and waiting-on-author state should remain open and independent of this inventory shard.
Draft maintainer-owned plugin fix is active work and not a safe duplicate, superseded, or low-signal closeout candidate.
Maintainer draft PR with proof and linked historical refs should stay open for maintainer review; no hydrated close target or allowed merge path exists.
